title: Rhynchelythrum nyassanum
intro: Rhynchelythrum nyassanum, also known as Nyassan wormwood, is a plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae, characterized by its aromatic leaves and stems. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which make it useful in treating various health conditions such as fever, digestive issues, and skin infections. The bioactive constituents of Rhynchelythrum nyassanum include sesquiterpene lactones, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its therapeutic properties. Traditionally, the plant is used to prepare infusions, decoctions, and essential oils, which are commonly used in folk medicine and herbal remedies to treat a range of health issues.

Rhynchelythrum nyassanum has also been traditionally used in some parts of the world to treat various health conditions, such as fever and digestive issues.
